expectations.text: Response is one-liner or near-minimal (no cardinality check)
expectations.evidence: Response is the one-liner `(Session & {...}).fetch1()` with a short note about return type and an alternative format.

expectations.text: Does not route to runtime_debugging.md or common_mistakes.md
expectations.evidence: No mention of runtime_debugging.md or common_mistakes.md.

expectations.text: Does not over-explain with a cardinality-verification dance (len/print) when the PK is unique — the one-liner fetch1() suffices for a known-unique PK lookup
expectations.evidence: No len/print cardinality dance. Just notes 'fetch1() ... will raise if the restriction matches anything other than exactly one row'.
